newTests.name:
Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > WSL functions in SCI > spel/wsl? returns a boolean
Integration tests for platform/discover-cdp. > discovers a fake CDP server > finds a server on a probed port

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > java->clj in SCI > converts nested structures recursively

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > clojure.walk via ns-alias > walk/keywordize-keys works without require
Integration tests for platform/discover-cdp. > returns nil when nothing is listening > returns nil for unused ports

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > clojure.set via ns-alias > set/union works without require
Unit tests for platform/probe-cdp — the shared CDP liveness check. > returns nil for non-CDP HTTP servers > returns nil when /json/version returns non-JSON
Unit tests for platform/probe-cdp — the shared CDP liveness check. > returns a map for a live CDP endpoint > extracts :host :port :browser :ws-url from /json/version

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > WSL functions in SCI > spel/wsl-default-gateway-ip returns nil or string

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > sci/fork isolation > forked context does not leak vars to parent

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > zprint via ns-alias > zp/zprint-str formats data

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > cdp-connect callable > spel/cdp-connect with no browser throws with clear message
Unit tests for platform/probe-cdp — the shared CDP liveness check. > returns nil for closed ports > returns nil for a port nothing listens on

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > java->clj in SCI > converts LinkedHashMap to Clojure map
Unit tests for platform/cdp-candidate-hosts. > on non-WSL machines > returns ["127.0.0.1"]

Tests for newly exposed SCI functions: WSL detection, java->clj,
   clojure.set, clojure.walk, zprint, ns-aliases, and cdp-connect. > clojure.set via ns-alias > set/difference works
